about.title: What's Daily Ledger?
about.intro: A daily operations board for everyone running more than one crypto project at once — the boring-but-critical stuff (transactions, Discord check-ins, tweets, content, airdrops) tracked in one place instead of scattered across notes.
about.howBody: You define the projects and recurring tasks once in Manage. Every day, Daily Ledger figures out what's due and shows it as a simple checklist. Check it off, and it's logged forever — so Stats can show you exactly what got done and what didn't, by day, week, month, or year.
features: Recurring tasks — daily, weekly, specific dates, or one-off
Airdrop tracker with a running USD total
Your own custom messages rotating through the top banner
Everything private to your account via row-level security
about.privacyBody: Every project, task, and log belongs to your account alone — no one else using this ledger can see it.
